title: LANE COUNTY-WIDE CRISIS LINE - 211info
text: LANE COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH LANE COUNTY-WIDE CRISIS LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a general crisis line. 2411 Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 682-1001 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 682-1001 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-5pm Services: General Crisis Intervention Hotlines Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - ADULT BEHAVIORAL HEALTH MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CHILD AND ADOLESCENT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MOBILE CRISIS SERVICES OF LANE COUNTY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LANE COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH
